commands.command: netsh wlan show profile name="<ssid>" key=clear
commands.description: Display a Wi-Fi profile including the saved password
Connect to a saved Wi-Fi network
Disconnect from the current Wi-Fi network

commands.command: netsh interface ip set address <adapter> static <ip> <mask> <gateway>
commands.description: Set a static IP address on a network adapter

commands.command: netsh interface ip set address <adapter> dhcp
commands.description: Set a network adapter to use DHCP

commands.command: netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state on
commands.description: Enable Windows Firewall for all profiles

commands.command: netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off
commands.description: Disable Windows Firewall for all profiles

commands.command: netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="<n>" protocol=TCP dir=in localport=<port> action=allow
commands.description: Add a firewall rule to allow inbound TCP traffic on a port

commands.command: netsh advfirewall firewall delete rule name="<n>"
commands.description: Delete a specific firewall rule by name
